## Summary

-

## PR Mode

- [ ] Review PR
- [ ] Autonomous PR

## Checks

- [ ] Lightweight local checks run
- [ ] `just check` run if PR is ready for merge
- [ ] `just test-e2e-fast` run if Docker/runtime behavior changed or PR is ready for merge
- [ ] `just test-e2e-slow` run if slow image or ROS launch behavior changed
- [ ] Docs updated if CLI/config/API/Docker behavior changed

## Merge

- [ ] Draft PR, no auto-merge
- [ ] Ready PR, auto-merge allowed
